name: HAIRegain
description: HAIRegain is a natural formulation combining Oryza Polyamine rice germ, OMEGIA® Sea Buckthorn, Lalmin® Zn100 zinc-enriched nutritional yeast, L-Cystine and horsetail extract. It is designed to promote hair growth, improve hair texture and prevent hair loss.
benefits: Contains all vitamins & minerals for healthy hair maintenance
Extends hair follicle growth phase and strengthens hair roots
Provides Omega 3, 6, 7 and 9 for improved hair texture
Zinc acts as DHT blocker to prevent hair loss
L-Cystine increases hair volume and density
Horsetail extract stimulates hair growth through bioactive silica

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 50°C)
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet in 125ml (1/2 cup) water or juice

ingredients: Omegia® whole sea buckthorn fruit powder
who_can_consume: Both men and women struggling with thinning hair or hair loss.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have scalp conditions.

qa.question: How long does it take to see results with HAIRegain?
qa.answer: Clinical studies show that Oryza Polyamine resulted in 87% improvement on hair texture in just 2 weeks. Sea Buckthorn studies showed almost 90% reported reductions in hair loss and over 78% reported improvements in hair thickness after 6 months.

qa.question: Is HAIRegain suitable for both men and women?
qa.answer: Yes, HAIRegain is suitable for both men and women struggling with thinning hair. It contains natural ingredients that support hair growth and health for all genders.
